mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as survey_count, AVG(survey_count) as avg_survey_count FROM stock_sentiment_survey WHERE code = #{code} AND max_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN zt_type = 'zt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as limit_up_count, SUM(CASE WHEN zt_type = 'zbgc' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as broken_count, AVG(strength) as avg_strength FROM stock_sentiment_zt WHERE code = #{code} AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT fi.roe as roe, fi.revenue_yoy as revenueYoy, fi.net_profit_yoy as netProfitYoy, fi.gross_profit_margin as grossMargin, fi.net_profit_margin as netProfitMargin, fi.debt_to_asset_ratio as debtRatio, -- 偿债能力 fi.current_ratio as currentRatio, fi.quick_ratio as quickRatio, -- 营运能力 fi.ar_turnover_days as arTurnoverDays, -- 现金流 fi.operating_cf_to_np as operatingCfToNp, fi.operating_cf_to_debt as operatingCfToDebt, -- 利润表展示字段（最新一期绝对值） inc.total_revenue as totalRevenue, inc.np_parent_company_owners as netProfitAbs, inc.deducted_np_parent_company as deductedNetProfit, -- 资产负债表展示字段 sb.cash_and_equivalents as monetaryCapital, sb.inventory as inventory, sb.goodwill as goodwill, -- 现金流量表展示字段 scf.free_cash_flow as freeCashFlow, -- 报告期 DATE_FORMAT(fi.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate FROM stock_financial_indicator fi LEFT JOIN stock_income inc ON inc.code = fi.code AND inc.end_date = fi.end_date LEFT JOIN stock_balance sb ON sb.code = fi.code AND sb.end_date = fi.end_date LEFT JOIN stock_cashflow scf ON scf.code = fi.code AND scf.end_date = fi.end_date WHERE fi.code = #{code} AND fi.end_date = (SELECT MAX(end_date) FROM stock_financial_indicator WHERE code = #{code}) LIMIT 1

SELECT ROUND( (CUR_YOY.deducted - PREV_YOY.deducted) / NULLIF(ABS(PREV_YOY.deducted), 0) * 100, 2 ) as yoy FROM ( SELECT si.deducted_np_parent_company as deducted FROM stock_income si WHERE si.code = #{code} AND si.deducted_np_parent_company IS NOT NULL AND si.end_date = (SELECT MAX(end_date) FROM stock_income WHERE code = #{code}) LIMIT 1 ) CUR_YOY, ( SELECT si2.deducted_np_parent_company as deducted FROM stock_income si2 WHERE si2.code = #{code} AND si2.deducted_np_parent_company IS NOT NULL AND si2.end_date = DATE_SUB( (SELECT MAX(end_date) FROM stock_income WHERE code = #{code}), INTERVAL 1 YEAR ) LIMIT 1 ) PREV_YOY

SELECT -- 近10日涨停天数（只统计zt_type='zt'且涨幅≥9.8%，按日期去重） COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT trade_date) FROM stock_sentiment_zt WHERE code = #{code} AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 10 DAY) AND zt_type = 'zt' AND pct_change >= 9.8 ), 0) as limitUpDays, 0 as limitUpStrength, -- 近20日炸板次数 (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT trade_date) FROM stock_sentiment_zt WHERE code = #{code} AND zt_type = 'zbgc' AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 20 DAY)) as brokenLimitUpCount20, -- 炸板率 = 炸板天数 / (涨停天数+炸板天数) * 100（只看涨停相关） COALESCE(( SELECT CASE WHEN zt_total > 0 THEN ROUND(zbgc_days * 100.0 / zt_total, 1) ELSE 0 END FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT trade_date) FROM stock_sentiment_zt WHERE code = #{code} AND zt_type IN ('zt', 'zbgc') AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 20 DAY)) as zt_total, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT trade_date) FROM stock_sentiment_zt WHERE code = #{code} AND zt_type = 'zbgc' AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 20 DAY)) as zbgc_days ) t ), 0.0) as brokenLimitUpRate, FALSE as isStrongStock, -- 龙虎榜净买入（近20日） (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_amount), 0) FROM stock_sentiment_lhb WHERE code = #{code} AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 20 DAY)) as lhbNetAmount, -- 龙虎榜上榜次数（近20日） (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_sentiment_lhb WHERE code = #{code} AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 20 DAY)) as lhbAppearCount, -- 正面公告数（近30日：回购/增持/业绩预增/股权激励/投资/建厂/产能扩张） (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_sentiment_notice WHERE code = #{code} AND notice_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND (title LIKE '%回购%' OR title LIKE '%增持%' OR title LIKE '%预增%' OR title LIKE '%股权激励%' OR title LIKE '%业绩快报%' OR title LIKE '%业绩预告%预增%' OR title LIKE '%投资%' OR title LIKE '%建厂%' OR title LIKE '%产能%' OR title LIKE '%扩产%' OR title LIKE '%在建%' OR title LIKE '%项目投产%')) as noticePositiveCount, -- 负面公告数（近30日：减持/定增/业绩预降/被调查/立案/行政处罚/退市） (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_sentiment_notice WHERE code = #{code} AND notice_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND (title LIKE '%减持%' OR title LIKE '%定增%' OR title LIKE '%预降%' OR title LIKE '%预亏%' OR title LIKE '%被调查%' OR title LIKE '%立案%' OR title LIKE '%行政处罚%' OR title LIKE '%退市%' OR title LIKE '%诉讼%' OR title LIKE '%仲裁%')) as noticeNegativeCount FROM dual
SELECT si.name, si.industry, si.total_market_cap FROM stock_info si WHERE si.code = #{code} LIMIT 1

SELECT (SELECT rating FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND rating IS NOT NULL AND rating != '' ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 1) as latestRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)) as reportCount FROM dual
SELECT rating, institution, report_date as reportDate, report_title as reportTitle, eps_forecast as epsForecast FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT rating, institution, report_date as reportDate, report_title as reportTitle, eps_forecast as epsForecast, pdf_url as pdfUrl FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(report_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(rating, '无评级') AS rating, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY month, rating ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(report_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT institution, MIN(report_date) AS first_date, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND institution IS NOT NULL AND institution != '' GROUP BY institution ORDER BY report_count DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT MIN(report_date) FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date IS NOT NULL
SELECT code, name, market FROM stock_info WHERE code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY code ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT si.code, si.name, si.market, si.industry, si.pe_ttm as peTtm, si.pb as pb, si.total_market_cap as totalMarketCap, si.float_market_cap as floatMarketCap FROM stock_info si WHERE si.industry = #{industry} AND si.code NOT LIKE '%.BJ' ORDER BY si.total_market_cap DESC

SELECT si.industry, COUNT(*) as stockCount, AVG(sd.change_percent) as avgChangePct FROM stock_info si LEFT JOIN ( SELECT code, change_percent FROM stock_daily WHERE trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM stock_daily) ) sd ON sd.code = si.code WHERE si.industry IS NOT NULL AND si.industry != '' AND si.market NOT IN ('BJ','北交所') GROUP BY si.industry ORDER BY avgChangePct DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT sc.concept_name as conceptName, COUNT(*) as stockCount, AVG(sd.change_percent) as avgChangePct FROM stock_concept sc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT code, change_percent FROM stock_daily WHERE trade_date = (SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM stock_daily) ) sd ON sd.code = sc.code GROUP BY sc.concept_name ORDER BY avgChangePct DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT sc.concept_name as conceptName, sc.code FROM stock_concept sc ORDER BY sc.concept_name, sc.code

SELECT (b.latest_balance - b.past_balance) / b.past_balance * 100 as chgPct FROM ( SELECT (SELECT margin_balance FROM stock_sentiment_margin_detail WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1) as latest_balance, (SELECT margin_balance FROM stock_sentiment_margin_detail WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) as past_balance ) b WHERE b.past_balance IS NOT NULL AND b.past_balance != 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_inst_amt), 0) as netAmount FROM stock_sentiment_lhb_inst WHERE code = #{code} AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 20 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) as surveyCount FROM stock_sentiment_survey WHERE code = #{code} AND meeting_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_main), 0) as netMain5d, COALESCE(AVG(net_main_pct), 0) as netMainPct5d FROM ( SELECT net_main, net_main_pct FROM stock_sentiment_moneyflow WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 5 ) t
SELECT change_pct FROM stock_shareholder WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN positive_keyword = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as positiveCount, SUM(CASE WHEN negative_keyword = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as negativeCount FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN title LIKE '%回购%' OR title LIKE '%增持%' OR title LIKE '%预增%' OR title LIKE '%股权激励%' OR title LIKE '%业绩快报%' OR title LIKE '%业绩预告%预增%' OR title LIKE '%投资%' OR title LIKE '%建厂%' OR title LIKE '%产能%' OR title LIKE '%扩产%' OR title LIKE '%在建%' OR title LIKE '%项目投产%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as positive_keyword, CASE WHEN title LIKE '%减持%' OR title LIKE '%定增%' OR title LIKE '%预降%' OR title LIKE '%预亏%' OR title LIKE '%被调查%' OR title LIKE '%立案%' OR title LIKE '%行政处罚%' OR title LIKE '%退市%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as negative_keyword FROM stock_sentiment_notice WHERE code = #{code} AND notice_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ) t
SELECT report_date, holder_count, avg_shares, change_pct, change_count FROM stock_shareholder WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT fund_name, fund_code, COALESCE(float_ratio, 0) as float_ratio, COALESCE(holding_quantity, 0) as shares_held, COALESCE(market_value, 0) as market_value, report_date FROM stock_fund_holder WHERE stock_code = #{code} AND report_date = ( SELECT MAX(report_date) FROM stock_fund_holder WHERE stock_code = #{code} ) ORDER BY float_ratio DESC LIMIT 10
